calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard #7156 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner/Parent, Chao Li Gee, is appearing in propia persona on behalf of the minor child, Xiao E Zhu.
Petitioner/Parent, Xingping Huang, is not present.

Cantonese Interpreter, Jenny Yao, is present to interpret for the petitioner.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Amended Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name of a minor. Chao Li Gee is sworn and examined by the Court through the Cantonese interpreter.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the change of name of the minor at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minor to: AMY GEE. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Text Ruling
